title: Pigeonpea Variety ICPL 332.Plant Material Description no.35
abstract: ICPL 332 is a pure line selection from a landrace found in Andhra Pradesh. Bulk seed of the landrace, ICRISAT germplasm accession no. ICP 1903, was heterogeneous for several characters. Single-plant selections of the bulk population were initially screened for Helicoverpa tolerance. Selections with tolerance were evaluated for yield in the 1982/83 rainy season at ICRISAT Center. From 1984/85 to 1988/89 further evaluations were carried out for Helicoverpa tolerance and yield in multinational trials in Andhra Pradesh.
